title: Verify qualified layout A adapter
preconditions: TALLY_INGEST_PRIVATE_FIXTURE_MANIFEST names at least one ignored layout A fixture and its external expected facts; PdfPig extraction is available.
steps: Load every layout A fixture through PrivateStatementFixtureSet; extract PdfDocumentEvidence twice; run PdfTextLayoutAStatementAdapter probe and extraction; compare structural match, ordered records, exact facts, exclusions, controls, and deterministic safe digests; run layout B and drifted evidence as negative probes.
expected: Exactly pdf-text-layout-a-v1 matches its assigned fixtures; layout B/drifted evidence does not match; every private expected fact/control agrees twice; no path/content enters output or source control.
cleanup: Dispose immutable evidence and isolated test state; leave caller-owned fixture bytes unchanged.
